mapper.insert: insert into category (name, sort, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: update category set name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update category set is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, name, sort, status, create_time from category where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, sort, status, create_time FROM category WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
select count(*) from category where name = #{name} and is_deleted = 0
select id, name from category where status = 1 and is_deleted = 0 order by sort asc, id desc
